name: node-get-caller-file
title: node-get-caller-file
description:
inspects the v8 stack trace
Call this function in a another function to find out the file from which that
function was called from.
.
Inspired by http://stackoverflow.com/questions/13227489
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-get-caller-file because inspects the v8 stack trace.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-get-caller-file as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-get-caller-file with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-get-caller-file --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
